transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Hi, I sent money to my friend four days ago and he hasn't received it. Seven hundred pounds.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: These things happen. Probably a bank holiday delay.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: There was no bank holiday. I sent it on a normal Tuesday.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Well sometimes Faster Payments just takes longer. It's out of our system now, not much I can do.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Not until it's been missing for two weeks. Before that it's too early to intervene.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Two weeks? That's seven hundred pounds — my friend needs that money.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Tell him to check with his bank. They might be able to see it their end.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: He has — they say they haven't received anything.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Maybe you entered the wrong details. Not much else I can do.

planted_violations: provided incorrect trace policy (stated 2 weeks; trace can be initiated immediately)
failed to raise a payment trace or take any remedial action
